creator: mark@foster.cc
text:
Fix: Please apply only after  patch-3.diff from ports/113675 has been applied.



-- 
Said one park ranger, 'There is considerable overlap between the
  intelligence of the smartest bears and the dumbest tourists.'
Mark D. Foster, CISSP <mark@foster.cc>  http://mark.foster.cc/--CmrLMCdV7Axu4Kd8l0wGN8YRH8C3eYZG4UuEYHSwu6vTOANO

+++ mt-daapd-0.2.4.2/Makefile	Wed Apr 30 22:12:27 2008
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
  #

  PORTNAME=	mt-daapd
-PORTVERSION=	0.2.4.1
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.2.4.2
  CATEGORIES=	audio japanese
  MASTER_SITES=	SF
